HomeDestinationsSittong
West Bengal

Sittong

The Orange Village of Bengal

Sun-drenched orange orchards heavy with fruit, the sweet citrus air mingling with mountain pine.

4.4
(145 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Sittong is a beautiful village famous for its orange orchards, bamboo groves, and the stunning Ahaldhara Viewpoint. A perfect blend of nature and agriculture.

History

A traditional village that has become famous for its organic orange cultivation and bamboo crafts.

Altitude

1,400 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Viewpoint

Ahaldhara Viewpoint

Panoramic views of the surrounding hills and valleys.

Nature

Orange Orchards

Endless rows of orange trees during harvest season.

KuboVista

Bamboo Bridge

A handmade bamboo bridge over a stream.

Why visit: Traditional engineering and photo opportunity

Viewpoints

sunrise

Ahaldhara Viewpoint

Sunrise over the orange valley.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Orange Kitchen

4.4

Local & Organic • ₹250-450

Fresh organic meals with orange-based dishes.

Cafes

Grove Cafe

4.3

Specialty: Orange Juice & Snacks

Freshly squeezed orange juice and light snacks.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Orange Market

Fresh oranges and orange-based products.

Organic orangesOrange marmaladeOrange wineBamboo crafts

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Orchard Walk

Easy

Walk through organic orange orchards.

2 hrs
₹500

Bamboo Craft Workshop

Easy

Learn traditional bamboo weaving.

3 hrs
₹800

Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
